prompt: Set of 6 individual icon illustrations for AI agent roles, arranged in a 3x2 grid. Each icon is a glowing geometric symbol on dark background: (1) dollar sign for Collections, (2) magnifying glass with checkmark for Job Review, (3) calendar/map pin for Dispatch, (4) document with pen for Estimates, (5) sunrise for Morning Briefing/GM, (6) speech bubble for Communications. Style: geometric, glowing gold #C9A84C outlines on deep navy #1B3A5C circles. Clean, minimal, premium. No text.
